name: UBS SDIC RuiFu SZ100 Multi-Class(LOF)
summary: UBS SDIC RuiFu SZ100 Multi-Class(LOF) is a multi-class Listed Open-Ended Fund (LOF) that invests in companies listed on the Shenzhen 100 Index. The fund aims to provide investors with exposure to the performance of leading companies in the Shenzhen stock market. It is managed by UBS SDIC Fund Management Co., Ltd., a joint venture between UBS and SDIC.
